creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 184063
shar

RStudio only builds on amd64 and only when FLANG=yes in R, which isn't made a default in R yet because flang is still amd64-only. BROKEN statement explains this.

But devel/rstudio works fine, and is useful, and it can be easily manually built by interested users. IMO, it can be committed in the current form with the BROKEN statement. The expectation is that flang will support i386 soon.
